Department: AI Location: Bangalore - India Description About us: Hiver is a modern, AI-driven customer service platform used by companies across healthcare, finance, logistics, education, and technology. We help teams deliver fast, human support across email, chat, phone, WhatsApp, and more — without the complexity of legacy helpdesks. We’re a challenger brand in a category dominated by over-engineered tools. We build software that is simple, powerful, and genuinely helpful, and we operate internally with that same philosophy. If you want meaningful ownership, thoughtful teammates, and work that ships, Hiver is a great place to do it. Opportunity: As an SDE II (Full Stack + AI) at Hiver, you will work end-to-end across frontend, backend, and AI systems to craft the next generation of collaborative email, automation, and AI-powered customer service workflows. You will own major product surfaces, architect scalable systems, and bring intelligent experiences to life in the UI – while ensuring reliability for 5M+ emails processed daily across thousands of active users. Key Responsibilities What you will do? Full-Stack Product Engineering Build intuitive, performant UIs in React/Next.js for email collaboration, analytics, and AI-assisted workflows. Ship features end-to-end across frontend, backend APIs, domain models, and data pipelines. Integrate AI suggestions, copilots, and retrieval-based workflows seamlessly into the product experience. Collaborate closely with design & product to deliver polished, consumer-grade UX. Backend, Distributed Systems & AI Scale backend systems to handle rapidly growing traffic and AI workloads. Build low-latency inference and retrieval endpoints, caching layers, and model-serving pipelines. Improve reliability, resiliency, and performance across monolith and microservices environments. Work with Kafka/RabbitMQ to build high-volume, event-driven data flows. Partner with ML/AI teams to deploy embeddings, rerankers, RAG systems, and evaluation workflows. Data, Security & Observability Implement secure, compliant data handling for structured/unstructured customer data. Own observability across the stack — tracing, metrics, dashboards, feature flags, SLOs. Lead debugging of complex issues across frontend, backend, infra, and model pipelines. Drive postmortems, root-cause analysis, and process improvements. What are we looking for? Must Have 3-5 years building and scaling production systems end-to-end. Strong proficiency in React/Next.js + TypeScript. Solid backend expertise in Go/Java/Python. Deep understanding of distributed systems, concurrency, performance, and resiliency. Experience with SQL plus familiarity with NoSQL/caches. Exposure to production model serving (embeddings, RAG, inference APIs). Strong fundamentals in cloud infra (AWS preferred), containers, and CI/CD. Nice to Have Experience with vector databases (pgvector, Pinecone, OpenSearch). Familiarity with vLLM, Triton, TorchServe, or model quantisation. OpenTelemetry, feature flag platforms, A/B testing systems. Prior experience building B2B SaaS or email/collaboration products. Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering and Information Technology Industries Software Development Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Hiver by 2x See who you know

Introduction At IBM Finance & Operations, we are the backbone of IBM’s transformation driving efficiency, transparency, and smart decision-making across the business. Our teams provide the insight and discipline that guide strategy, ensure financial strength, and enable IBM to invest in innovation and growth. Working in Finance & Operations means combining analytical skills with collaboration and curiosity. You’ll partner with colleagues across functions and geographies, using data, technology, and process excellence to create solutions that improve performance and deliver measurable impact. IBM offers continuous learning, career development, and a culture that values diverse perspectives. Join us and be part of a global team that keeps IBM moving forward, while building your own future in a dynamic and evolving environment. Your Role And Responsibilities As an AI software engineer - design, build, deploy and maintain AI, ML and GenAI powered software solutions. Work on bridging software engineering and machine learning by transforming models into scalable, secure, and production-ready systems that solve real business problems. Experience in handling LLMs, prompt engineering, embeddings, and vector databases. Delivery using leading-edge and/or proven technologies, working closely with stakeholders to meet requirements and expectations. Working in an Agile, collaborative environment to understand stakeholder requirements, aligning with team goals and objectives. Required Technical And Professional Expertise AI & Machine Learning Development Design, develop, evaluate, and optimize machine learning and Generative AI solutions Select appropriate algorithms and frameworks based on business and technical requirements Experience in handling LLMs, prompt engineering, embeddings, and vector databases. Hands on experience on handling structured data in generative AI solutions Experience on working with RAG solutions Experience on working with Front end framework like React.Js Hands on experience on Python, REST API, microservices Software Engineering Build scalable, maintainable, and modular AI-driven applications Integrate AI models into backend services, APIs, and enterprise systems Write clean, testable, and efficient code following best engineering practices Deployment Deploy models or services using containers, cloud platforms Monitor solution performance, latency, and reliability in production Data & Collaboration Collaborate with product managers and domain experts Work with large structured and unstructured Databases Security, Ethics & Compliance Ensure responsible and ethical AI development Address model bias, explainability, privacy, and security concerns Comply with organizational and regulatory standards Preferred Technical And Professional Experience Familiarity with Agile development Demonstrated ability to operate within short release cycles Ability to develop and deploy following best-in-class engineering practices Experience designing enterprise level solutions for clients Ability to explain complex AI concepts to non-technical stakeholders Show more Show less Seniority level Mid-Senior level Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering and Information Technology Industries IT Services and IT Consulting Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at IBM by 2x See who you know
